summary: Full backend + frontend regression for Cash AI port, persistence, WebSocket live events, fixtures extraction, and landing-page Proof of Work showcase. All 83 pytest tests pass (15 code_merger + 41 backend_api + 13 distillation unit + 7 distillation live + 7 cash_ai). Cash AI page renders correctly with Cost Guard apr_004 (97% conf, high risk) as Last Cash Decision per user choice (b). 11-agent fleet intact. WS live event pill fires on cycle.triggered and cache.cleared. Landing /#proof shows live numbers across all 7 testids (99.9% uptime, 23 cycles, 62 assets, 3 guards, 72% distillation savings, 11/11 fleet, $9,623 30d revenue).
action_items: Optional: server.py is currently 617 lines (review_request expected under 500). Consider extracting Cash AI endpoints to backend/routers/cash_ai.py and distillation endpoints to backend/routers/distillation.py to satisfy the size target. Not blocking — code is well-organized.

Optional: subscribeCycle in api.js returns a cleanup function that itself returns `closed` (a boolean), but useEffect cleanup return value is ignored, so this is harmless. Minor cosmetic — drop the `return closed;` inside the cleanup closure.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 617 lines — exceeds the stated <500 line target. Recommend splitting into routers (cash_ai, distillation, code_merger, fixtures-backed-ops).

Cash AI /api/cash/last-decision: ordering of approvals by confidence is correct (apr_004 = 0.97 wins over apr_005 = 0.94). Sovereign-decision fallback path is exercised only if all approvals close — covered by code but not unit-tested.
ws_hub.broadcast iterates a snapshot and silently drops dead connections — good. No back-pressure handling but acceptable for preview scale.
Mongo _id is popped on /api/cash/cycle/trigger and /api/agent-runs — verified, no _id leakage in responses.

Cash AI page agent-card grid selector `[data-testid^="cash-agent-"]` will accidentally match `cash-agent-count` testid (the Metric). Currently fine because the Metric is not inside the grid, but the off-by-one is a latent bug if anyone changes the testid prefix scheme.
subscribeCycle does not auto-reconnect on WS drop; not critical but worth noting for production.
seed_data_creation: Tests inserted live records into Mongo collections: agent_runs (1 new from test_execute_persists_run), approval_decisions (1 new from test_decide_approval_persists), cycle_events (1 new from test_trigger_cycle_persists_and_returns_id), distillation_cache (cleared by test_clear_cache_returns_deleted_count and UI Clear Cache click).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Cash AI + persistence + WS + Proof of Work flows pass. 83/83 pytest. Frontend Cash AI page (/dashboard/cash-ai) and landing #proof both render live data. Last Cash Decision correctly pinned to apr_004 (Cost Guard, 97%, high). WS live event pill verified on both cycle.triggered and cache.cleared. No retest needed unless user changes fixture confidences (then apr_004 may no longer be the highest).
